basic_details.job_title: Kalakshetra Foundation Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Faculty Posts
basic_details.short_information: Kalakshetra Foundation Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the Kalakshetra Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 60 years Age Relaxation: Kalakshetra reserves right to relax the Eligibility criteria for deserving candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Diploma / Masters Degree in relevant subject
qualification.details: Bharatanatyam: Post Diploma in Bharatanatyam from Kalakshetra Foundation. Minimum 5 years teaching experience with regular art practices. Vocal - Carnatic Music: Post Diploma in Carnatic Music from Kalakshetra Foundation / Masters Degree in Carnatic Music from a recognized University. Minimum 5 years teaching experience with regular art practices. Veena - Carnatic Music: Post Diploma in Carnatic Music from Kalakshetra Foundation / Masters Degree in Carnatic Music from a recognized University. Minimum 5 years teaching experience with regular art practices. Violin - Carnatic Music: Post Diploma in Carnatic Music from Kalakshetra Foundation / Masters Degree in Carnatic Music from a recognized University. Minimum 5 years teaching experience with regular art practices. Mirudangam - Carnatic Music: Post Diploma in Carnatic Music from Kalakshetra Foundation / Masters Degree in Carnatic Music from a recognized University. Minimum 5 years teaching experience with regular art practices. Language Teacher Tamil: Degree/Master degree in the relevant subject. At least five years teaching experience in relevant language.

salary_details.details: Bharatanatyam, Vocal - Carnatic Music, Veena - Carnatic Music, Violin - Carnatic Music, Mirudangam - Carnatic Music: Rs.20,000 p.m. to Rs.36,000 p.m. depending upon experience, subject, working hours etc. Language Teacher Tamil: Rs.15,000 p.m. to Rs.20,000 p.m. depending upon experience, subject, working hours etc.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Kalakshetra Foundation Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Kalakshetra Foundation Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Kalakshetra Foundation Faculty recruitment is 10th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for the Faculty positions at Kalakshetra Foundation. These vacancies are distributed across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification generally includes a Post Diploma or Masters Degree in the relevant subject, along with a minimum of 5 years of teaching experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 60 years. However, Kalakshetra Foundation reserves the right to relax the eligibility criteria for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 36,000 per month, depending on the specific post, experience, and other factors.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. Which subjects are included in the Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes positions for Bharatanatyam, Carnatic Music (Vocal, Veena, Violin, Mirudangam), and Language Teacher Tamil.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Kalakshetra Foundation located?
faq.answer: Kalakshetra Foundation is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600041.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Chennai, Tamil Nadu. While not explicitly stated, candidates from other states may apply if they meet all eligibility criteria and are willing to relocate.
